title: Savory Japanese Soy Milk Stir-fry
description: A tender and energizing savory dish featuring soy milk, high-protein-friendly and perfect for a quick lunch or snack.

ingredients.name: tofu
ingredients.amount: 1 block (firm or soft), cut into cubes

instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add minced ginger and sliced scallions, stir-fry for about 1 minute until fragrant.
Pour in chicken broth and soy milk, bring to a simmer.
Gently add tofu cubes, let them cook for another 2 minutes.
Drizzle with soy sauce and sesame oil, mix well.
Stir-fry briefly until everything is heated through and the flavors are combined.
Fold in crushed peanuts, serve immediately.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
